languages.text: {n}Уголок губ, где осталась плоть силится подняться в благодарной улыбке. С трудом выталкивая каждое слово, Нунциус хрипит:{/n} "Я рад... что он был... не один..."
{n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."
languages.original_text: {n}Уголок губ, где осталась плоть силится подняться в благодарной улыбке. С трудом выталкивая каждое слово, Нунциус хрипит:{/n} "Я рад... что он был... не один..."

{n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

languages.text: {n}Las comisuras de sus labios, donde aún conserva un poco de carne, se estiran en una sonrisa de agradecimiento. Esforzándose en pronunciar cada palabra, Nuncius responde con voz ronca:{/n} «Me alegro... de que no... estuviese solo...».
languages.original_text: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Las comisuras de sus labios, donde aún conserva un poco de carne, se estiran en una sonrisa de agradecimiento. Esforzándose en pronunciar cada palabra, Nuncius responde con voz ronca:{/n} «Me alegro... de que no... estuviese solo...».

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯那残存血肉的嘴角勉强挤出一个感激的微笑，他用嘶哑的嗓音艰难地挤出每一个字：{/n}“我很高兴……他不是……独自一人……”
languages.original_text: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯那残存血肉的嘴角勉强挤出一个感激的微笑，他用嘶哑的嗓音艰难地挤出每一个字：{/n}“我很高兴……他不是……独自一人……”

languages.text: {n}Le coin de ses lèvres, là où il reste de la chair, se retrousse avec peine pour esquisser un sourire reconnaissant. Avec un effort manifeste pour prononcer chaque mot, Nuncius dit d'une voix rauque :{/n} « Je suis... heureux qu'il... n'ait pas été... seul... »
languages.original_text: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le coin de ses lèvres, là où il reste de la chair, se retrousse avec peine pour esquisser un sourire reconnaissant. Avec un effort manifeste pour prononcer chaque mot, Nuncius dit d'une voix rauque :{/n} « Je suis... heureux qu'il... n'ait pas été... seul... »

languages.text: {n}Dudaklarının et kalan kenarı, minnettar bir gülümsemeyle kıvrılmaya çalışıyor. Her kelimeyi zorla dışarı çıkaran Nuncius, hırıltıyla konuşuyor.{/n} "Yalnız... Olmamasına... Sevindim..."
languages.original_text: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dudaklarının et kalan kenarı, minnettar bir gülümsemeyle kıvrılmaya çalışıyor. Her kelimeyi zorla dışarı çıkaran Nuncius, hırıltıyla konuşuyor.{/n} "Yalnız... Olmamasına... Sevindim..."

languages.text: {n}Er versucht vergeblich, seinen noch organischen Mundwinkel zu einem dankbaren Lächeln zu verziehen. Mit letzter Kraft keucht Nuncius:{/n} "Ich bin froh ... dass er nicht ... allein war ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Er versucht vergeblich, seinen noch organischen Mundwinkel zu einem dankbaren Lächeln zu verziehen. Mit letzter Kraft keucht Nuncius:{/n} "Ich bin froh ... dass er nicht ... allein war ..."

languages.text: {n}肉の残る口の端が、感謝の笑みを浮かべようと、もがくように持ち上がる。一語一語を絞り出すように、ヌンキウスがかすれた声で言う。{/n}「よかった……彼が……独りでは……なかったから……」
languages.original_text: {n}The corner of his lips where flesh remains struggles to lift in a grateful smile. Struggling to force out each word, Nuncius rasps,{/n} "I'm glad... that he was... not alone..."

traits.locale_text: {n}肉の残る口の端が、感謝の笑みを浮かべようと、もがくように持ち上がる。一語一語を絞り出すように、ヌンキウスがかすれた声で言う。{/n}「よかった……彼が……独りでは……なかったから……」
